chapter_goal: Make filtered complexes and spectral-sequence pages concrete enough to see how mixed Hodge data emerges.
checks: differential squares to zero in the toy double complex
survivor ranks match the final associated graded
lab: Change one differential on the E1 page and observe which class survives to E2 and which becomes a boundary.
library_routes: JSON ledgers for ranks and survivors
pitfalls: reading an E1 term as the final answer
mixing the Hodge filtration with the weight filtration
proof_moves: resolve a complex before taking cohomology
filter a complex and read successive pages
use degeneration to extract a filtration on cohomology
visual_focus: An E-page grid with visible arrows, deaths, and survivors trains the eye to read filtered cohomology.
